requirement_topic.en: Local Lebanese Authorized Importer / Agent and Bilingual Arabic/French Documentation Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 当地黎巴嫩授权进口商/代理人及阿拉伯语/法语双语文件要求
requirement_topic.zht: 當地黎巴嫩授權進口商/代理人及阿拉伯語/法語雙語文件要求

summary.en: A locally registered Lebanese importer or authorized agent is required to import and place wireless and telecom terminal equipment on the Lebanese market. The importer must be registered with the Lebanese customs authority and is responsible for ensuring the device holds valid TRA type approval at the time of importation. Technical documentation, product labelling, and user-facing materials should be provided in Arabic and French (bilingual) — TRA and Lebanese customs authorities strongly prefer bilingual documentation, reflecting Lebanon's dual official-language administrative heritage. Device packaging and labelling must include at minimum: TRA type approval certificate reference, device model designation, manufacturer and importer contact information in Arabic or French, and applicable safety markings. There is no mandatory national consumer protection labelling law equivalent to the EU's General Product Safety Regulation that is currently enforced uniformly, but TRA type approval conditions and customs practice effectively require bilingual identification.
summary.zh: 在黎巴嫩市场进口和销售无线及电信终端设备，须有当地注册的黎巴嫩进口商或授权代理人。进口商须在黎巴嫩海关当局登记注册，并负责确保设备在进口时持有有效的TRA型号认证。技术文件、产品标签和面向用户的材料应以阿拉伯语和法语（双语）提供 — TRA和黎巴嫩海关当局强烈建议双语文件，体现黎巴嫩双官方语言行政传统。设备包装和标签至少须包含：TRA型号认证证书编号、设备型号名称、制造商和进口商阿拉伯语或法语联系信息，以及适用安全标志。目前没有统一执行的与欧盟《通用产品安全条例》相当的强制性国家消费者保护标签法，但TRA型号认证条件和海关实践实际上要求双语标识。
summary.zht: 在黎巴嫩市場進口和銷售無線及電信終端設備，須有當地註冊的黎巴嫩進口商或授權代理人。進口商須在黎巴嫩海關當局登記註冊，並負責確保裝置在進口時持有有效的TRA型號認證。技術文件、產品標籤和面向用戶的材料應以阿拉伯語和法語（雙語）提供 — TRA和黎巴嫩海關當局強烈建議雙語文件，體現黎巴嫩雙官方語言行政傳統。裝置包裝和標籤至少須包含：TRA型號認證證書編號、裝置型號名稱、製造商和進口商阿拉伯語或法語聯繫信息，以及適用安全標誌。目前沒有統一執行的與歐盟《通用產品安全條例》相當的強制性國家消費者保護標籤法，但TRA型號認證條件和海關實踐實際上要求雙語標識。

standards_or_laws: Lebanon Telecom Law 431/2002 (TRA type approval — importer responsibility)
Lebanese Customs Law (importer registration and documentation requirements)
Lebanese Official Languages (Arabic and French — administrative bilingualism)
TRA Type Approval Conditions (labelling and documentation)

summary.en: In China, a domestic responsible entity (manufacturer or authorized importer) must be identified on CCC certification and product labelling. Chinese product labelling is required in Mandarin Chinese under GB standards and relevant product-specific regulations. There is no Arabic or French labelling requirement under China's domestic regime. The Chinese domestic labelling and importer framework does not satisfy Lebanon's bilingual Arabic/French documentation preference and TRA importer registration requirements.
summary.zh: 在中国，CCC认证和产品标签上须标识国内责任主体（制造商或授权进口商）。依据GB标准和相关产品专项法规，中国产品标签须使用普通话。中国国内体制下无阿拉伯语或法语标签要求。中国国内标签和进口商框架不满足黎巴嫩阿拉伯语/法语双语文件建议及TRA进口商注册要求。
summary.zht: 在中國，CCC認證和產品標籤上須標識國內責任主體（製造商或授權進口商）。依據GB標準和相關產品專項法規，中國產品標籤須使用普通話。中國國內體制下無阿拉伯語或法語標籤要求。中國國內標籤和進口商框架不滿足黎巴嫩阿拉伯語/法語雙語文件建議及TRA進口商注冊要求。

standards_or_laws: CCC certification (responsible entity designation — China domestic)
GB product labelling standards (Mandarin Chinese — China domestic)

gap.en: A locally registered Lebanese importer or authorized agent is required — Chinese domestic CCC importer designation does not satisfy this requirement. Product labelling and technical documentation must be provided in Arabic and/or French; Chinese-only or English-only documentation is not preferred by TRA or Lebanese customs and may cause clearance delays. The TRA type approval certificate reference must appear on device packaging. Exporters should appoint a Lebanese registered entity as the official importer before commencing the TRA type approval process, as the importer is typically named in the TRA application.
gap.zh: 须有当地注册的黎巴嫩进口商或授权代理人 — 中国国内CCC进口商指定不满足此要求。产品标签和技术文件须以阿拉伯语和/或法语提供；仅中文或仅英文文件不被TRA或黎巴嫩海关优先考虑，可能导致通关延误。TRA型号认证证书编号须显示于设备包装上。出口商应在启动TRA型号认证程序前委任黎巴嫩注册主体作为官方进口商，因为进口商通常在TRA申请中被列名。
gap.zht: 須有當地註冊的黎巴嫩進口商或授權代理人 — 中國國內CCC進口商指定不滿足此要求。產品標籤和技術文件須以阿拉伯語和/或法語提供；僅中文或僅英文文件不被TRA或黎巴嫩海關優先考慮，可能導致通關延誤。TRA型號認證證書編號須顯示於裝置包裝上。出口商應在啟動TRA型號認證程序前委任黎巴嫩註冊主體作為官方進口商，因為進口商通常在TRA申請中被列名。

source.publisher: TRA — Telecommunications Regulatory Authority (Lebanon / هيئة ناظمة للاتصالات)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A locally registered Lebanese importer or authorized agent is mandatory for import and sale of wireless devices in Lebanon. Arabic/French bilingual documentation and labelling is strongly preferred by TRA and Lebanese customs and is effectively required in practice. The TRA type approval certificate reference must appear on device packaging. Chinese domestic importer designation and Mandarin-only labelling are not sufficient.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 当地注册的黎巴嫩进口商或授权代理人，对于在黎巴嫩进口和销售无线设备为强制要求。TRA和黎巴嫩海关强烈建议阿拉伯语/法语双语文件和标签，实践中实际要求如此。TRA型号认证证书编号须显示于设备包装上。中国国内进口商指定和仅普通话标签不符合要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 當地註冊的黎巴嫩進口商或授權代理人，對於在黎巴嫩進口和銷售無線裝置為強制要求。TRA和黎巴嫩海關強烈建議阿拉伯語/法語雙語文件和標籤，實踐中實際要求如此。TRA型號認證證書編號須顯示於裝置包裝上。中國國內進口商指定和僅普通話標籤不符合要求。
